mapper.select: select distinct page_category from page_info where page_info is not null order by page_category desc
select * from page_info order by page_category desc, page_seq
mapper.update: update page_info set page_info = #{page_info}, page_category = #{page_category} where page_seq = #{page_seq}
update page_info set page_category = #{newCategoryName} where page_category = #{oldCategoryName}
